text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced at 01:40 on April 11 that they carried out a drone strike targeting Israeli forces inside a house in Chamaa, reporting direct hits. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced at 00:40 and 01:15 on April 11 that they launched rocket attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Metula, and Misgav Am, as well as Israeli military infrastructure in Safed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党于4月11日01:40宣布，他们对沙马（Chamaa）一所房屋内的以色列军队进行了无人机袭击，并报告称直接命中目标。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党于4月11日00:40和01:15宣布，他们对基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）、梅图拉（Metula）和米斯加夫阿姆（Misgav Am）定居点以及萨法德（Safed）的以色列军事基础设施发动了火箭弹袭击。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The U.S. continues to deploy troops to the Middle East as the U.S. and Iran renew negotiations this weekend. Additional fighter jets and attack planes are being transferred to the region alongside 1,500-2,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division. Additional Marine and Naval forces are enroute to the region as well. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：随着美国和伊朗本周末重启谈判，美国继续向中东部署军队。除了第82空降师的1500-2000名士兵外，更多的战斗机和攻击机也被调往该地区。更多的海军陆战队和海军部队也正在前往该地区的途中。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🪐🚀 NASA shares a photo of the Milky Way galaxy taken by Artemis II astronauts. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🌕 🚀 Artemis II returns to Earth and splashes down near San Diego after a successful trip around the moon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🪐🚀 美国国家航空航天局（NASA）分享了一张由阿耳忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）宇航员拍摄的银河系照片。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🌕 🚀 阿耳忒弥斯2号在成功绕月飞行后返回地球，并在圣地亚哥附近溅落。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Reports in Palestinian media indicate that around six people, likely Hamas-police operatives, were killed in an Israeli airstrike in near the Al-Bureij camp, central Gaza Strip. The IDF has yet to confirm the strike. @wfwitness

text: Despite the lies told by the Lebanese president that the talks are for a ceasefire, The Israeli ambassador to Washington: In today's conversation, Israel agreed to a follow-up meeting on Tuesday to reach a peace agreement with Lebanon, but did not agree to discuss a ceasefire with Hezbollah. The bastard Aoun should be in Pakistan directly talking to the master: The U.S not Israel
text_zh: 尽管黎巴嫩总统谎称会谈是为了停火，但以色列驻华盛顿大使表示：在今天的谈话中，以色列同意周二举行后续会议以达成与黎巴嫩的和平协议，但不同意讨论与真主党的停火。那个混蛋奥恩应该直接去巴基斯坦与主人对话：美国，而不是以色列。

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "—❗️🇮🇷/🇵🇰/🇺🇸 NEW: Pakistan has released a list of names from the Iranian delegation It consists of 86 officials, experts, and media personnel. Some important names that are attending, which weren’t mentioned in media extensively, are Baqeri Kani, deputy of…" 🇮🇷 Iranian Negotiating Team is organized into five committees: ➡️ General Committee — led by Parliament Speaker Qalibaf ➡️ Political Committee — led by Foreign Minister Araqchi ➡️ Military Committee — led by Defense Council Chairman Ahmadian ➡️ Economic Committee — led by Central Bank Governor Hemmati ➡️ Legal Committee — led by Deputy Foreign Ministers Baqaei and Gharibabadi 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“—❗️🇮🇷/🇵🇰/🇺🇸 最新消息：巴基斯坦公布了伊朗代表团的名单，其中包括86名官员、专家和媒体人员。一些出席但未在媒体上广泛提及的重要人物包括最高国家安全委员会副秘书巴盖里·卡尼（Baqeri Kani）……” 🇮🇷 伊朗谈判小组分为五个委员会：➡️ 总委员会 — 由议长卡利巴夫领导 ➡️ 政治委员会 — 由外交部长阿拉格齐领导 ➡️ 军事委员会 — 由国防委员会主席艾哈迈迪安领导 ➡️ 经济委员会 — 由中央银行行长赫马蒂领导 ➡️ 法律委员会 — 由副外交部长巴盖伊和加里巴巴迪领导 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iran's been unable to quickly open the Strait of Hormuz to more shipping traffic since it cannot locate all the mines it laid in the waterway and now lacks the capability to remove them, say U.S. officials — NYT https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042748051228381411/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 据《纽约时报》报道，美国官员称，伊朗自布设水雷以来一直无法迅速重新开放霍尔木兹海峡以供更多航运通行，因为它无法定位其在水道中布设的所有水雷，且目前缺乏清除它们的能力。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042748051228381411/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Iran has been unable to fully open the Strait of Hormuz because it 'cannot locate all of the mines it laid in the waterway' and currently 'lacks the capability to remove them', according to New York Times report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：据《纽约时报》报道，伊朗一直无法完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，因为其“无法定位其在水道中布设的所有水雷”，且目前“缺乏清除它们的能力”。推文

text: OSINTdefender The USS John P. Murtha is positioned off San Diego about 5 miles from the projected splashdown point of the Artemis II crew, with other assets, including deployed weather balloons, on hand to aid in the wider mission. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042746106870734896/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 约翰·P·默萨号（USS John P. Murtha）两栖船坞运输舰正位于圣地亚哥外海，距离阿耳忒弥斯2号机组人员预计溅落点约5英里处，其他资产（包括部署的气象气球）也已就位，以协助更广泛的任务。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042746106870734896/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender We are now under 50 minutes from the splashdown of the Artemis II crew and just 13 minutes from the separation of the crew and service modules before the final burn prior to reentry. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042744777586741682/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 现在距离阿耳忒弥斯2号机组人员溅落还有不到50分钟，距离机组和服务舱分离还有13分钟，随后将进行再入大气层前的最后一次点火。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042744777586741682/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 BREAKING | U.S. intelligence indicates Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles and could restore parts of its launch capability by recovering launchers from underground storage sites, despite repeated US/Israeli strikes throughout the war, according to WSJ, citing U.S. officials. ➡️ While more than half of Iran’s launchers are believed to have been destroyed, damaged, or trapped underground, U.S. officials assess that many could eventually be repaired or dug out. ➡️ Some in Washington are concerned Tehran could use the current pause in fighting to rebuild elements of its missile arsenal even as efforts continue to solidify the ceasefire and fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 快讯 | 据《华尔街日报》援引美国官员的话称，美国情报显示，尽管在整个战争期间美国/以色列进行了多次打击，伊朗仍拥有数千枚弹道导弹，并可能通过从地下储存点回收发射装置来恢复部分发射能力。➡️ 虽然据信伊朗超过一半的发射装置已被摧毁、损坏或困在地下，但美国官员评估认为，许多装置最终可以修复或挖掘出来。➡️ 华盛顿的一些人担心，德黑兰可能会利用当前的战斗间歇期重建其导弹武库的要素，即使各方仍在努力巩固停火并全面重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Instant News Alerts Iran still has thousands of missiles that it could use by retrieving launchers from underground storage areas, U.S. intelligence finds. (WSJ) tweet
text_zh: Instant News Alerts 美国情报发现，伊朗仍有数千枚导弹，可以通过从地下储存区取回发射装置来使用。（《华尔街日报》）推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Rep. Adam Schiff has withdrawn his endorsement of Eric Swalwell after a former staffer accused the California gubernatorial candidate of sexual assault. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042738410968789062/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 在一名工作人员指控加州州长候选人埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell）性侵后，美国众议员亚当·希夫（Adam Schiff）撤回了对他的背书。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042738410968789062/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Vietnam veterans are suing Trump over his planned 250-foot triumphal arch near Arlington, warning it would disrupt the cemetery’s historic view and bypass proper approvals. Trump’s response: “You’ve got to be kidding.” Trump: “I am pleased to announce that TODAY my Administration officially filed the presentation and plans to the highly respected Commission of Fine Arts for what will be the GREATEST and MOST BEAUTIFUL Triumphal Arch, anywhere in the World. This will be a wonderful addition to the Washington D.C. area for all Americans to enjoy for many decades to come! President DONALD J. TRUMP” - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 越战老兵正在起诉特朗普，反对他在阿灵顿附近计划建造的250英尺高的凯旋门，警告称这将破坏公墓的历史景观并绕过适当的审批程序。特朗普的回应：“你在开玩笑吧。” 特朗普：“我很高兴地宣布，今天我的政府正式向备受尊敬的美术委员会提交了展示和计划，这将是世界上任何地方最伟大、最美丽的凯旋门。这将是华盛顿特区地区的一个美妙补充，供所有美国人在未来几十年里享受！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普” - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: What would a good deal look like for you? U.S. President Donald Trump: "No nuclear weapon, number one. You know, I think it’s already been regime changed, but we never had that as a criteria. No nuclear weapon. That’s 99% of it. Reporter: Strait or more moves as well? Trump: "Yeah, but that’ll open up automatically. Yeah, the answer is yes, but the strait will open up. If we just left, the strait’s going to… otherwise, they make no money. So the strait’s going to open. But what we have is no nuclear weapon, but we’ll open the strait anyway. Don’t forget, we don’t use the strait. Other countries use the strait. So we do have other countries coming up, and they’ll help out. But we don’t use it. It won’t be easy. It won’t be… I would say this: We will have that open fairly soon." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 记者：对你来说，什么样的协议才算好协议？美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“第一，没有核武器。你知道，我认为政权已经更迭了，但我们从未将其作为标准。没有核武器。这就是99%的内容。” 记者：海峡或其他举措呢？特朗普：“是的，但那会自动开放。是的，答案是肯定的，但海峡会开放。如果我们只是离开，海峡就会……否则，他们就赚不到钱。所以海峡会开放。但我们拥有的是没有核武器，无论如何我们都会开放海峡。别忘了，我们不使用海峡。其他国家使用海峡。所以我们有其他国家参与，他们会帮忙。但我们不使用它。这不容易。我只想说：我们很快就会让它开放。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: Is this a one-and-done talk or are you open to more talks after this? U.S. President Donald Trump: "I have to see what happens tomorrow. They've been talking for 47 years with other Presidents - and we're not doing much talking." Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042734056417157171/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 记者：这是一次性的谈话，还是你愿意在此之后进行更多谈话？美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“我得看看明天会发生什么。他们已经和其他总统谈了47年了——而我们并没有进行太多谈话。” 由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042734056417157171/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix The @FDD in all its glory Europe can’t afford an army. Its people are aging. The working force works part time. The state welfare is very generous. Governments are already in debt and no European wants to fight because there’s no notion of the homeland and patriotism. Europe will become Algeria by 2075, as Islamist, autocratic and failing. Sanchez is the outcome of the European malaise, not its transformational leader. - Hussain Abdul-Hussain tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix @FDD 的辉煌时刻：欧洲负担不起军队。它的人口正在老龄化。劳动力在兼职工作。国家福利非常慷慨。政府已经负债累累，没有欧洲人愿意战斗，因为没有家国情怀和爱国主义的概念。到2075年，欧洲将变成阿尔及利亚，伊斯兰化、独裁且失败。桑切斯是欧洲苦难的结果，而不是其变革型领导人。 - Hussain Abdul-Hussain 推文

text: Nuno Felix This is just hilarious Moving the US military out of west European bases will be costly, slow and complicated. These bases are large and sophisticated. Wherever we move to has to be equally sophisticated and secure. A good place to start is moving from Spain to Morocco, where the US used to have a SAC base. Morocco has several modern facilities, including our former bases. Morocco is already a designated non-NATO major ally (so is Bahrain), is a member of the Abraham Accords, and is pro-western. They’re also a tolerant and beautiful country. The US has options. If Spain, France and Italy won’t help us, we can find better places to go. - Ari Fleischer tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这太搞笑了：将美军从西欧基地撤出将是昂贵、缓慢且复杂的。这些基地规模庞大且复杂。无论我们搬到哪里，都必须同样复杂和安全。一个好的起点是从西班牙搬到摩洛哥，美国过去在那里有一个战略空军司令部（SAC）基地。摩洛哥有几个现代化的设施，包括我们以前的基地。摩洛哥已经被指定为非北约主要盟友（巴林也是），是《亚伯拉罕协议》的成员，并且亲西方。他们也是一个宽容而美丽的国家。美国有选择。如果西班牙、法国和意大利不帮助我们，我们可以找到更好的去处。 - Ari Fleischer 推文

text: Open Source Intel A suspect has been taken into custody after fires were set in at least two stores at Ontario Mills Mall in California, reports say. @ResistWire https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042732580085108995/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据报道，在加利福尼亚州安大略米尔斯购物中心（Ontario Mills Mall）至少两家商店发生火灾后，一名嫌疑人已被拘留。@ResistWire https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042732580085108995/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "The delegation will then meet with U.S. officials if it is confirmed that preconditions have been met.’" We will not go to Pakistan until preconditions met Then We won't meet the Americans until we get the preconditions Later? We won't put the pen on the paper of the deal without the preconditions..
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“‘如果确认已满足先决条件，代表团随后将与美国官员会面。’” 在满足先决条件之前，我们不会去巴基斯坦。然后，在满足先决条件之前，我们不会与美国人会面。后来？没有先决条件，我们不会在协议上签字……

text: The Spectator Index US Vice President JD Vance has departed Paris and is on his way to Pakistan for Iran talks. tweet

This will be a wonderful addition to the Washington D.C. area for all Americans to enjoy for many decades to come! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet

text: WarMonitor Orban can veto key EU decisions and block NATO consensus, giving Russia an extraordinary advantage over Europe. So the real question is... why is Trump putting Americans and Europeans on the line to help Putin? Gotta wonder what’s going on, Hungary is a small country yet Trump and Vance are obsessed with Orban. Hungary first foreign policy? Hungarians…. I hope the Trump endorsement is the kiss of political death it should be - Adam Kinzinger (Slava Ukraini) 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 欧尔班可以否决欧盟的关键决定并阻止北约共识，这给了俄罗斯相对于欧洲的非凡优势。所以真正的问题是……为什么特朗普要让美国人和欧洲人冒险去帮助普京？不得不怀疑发生了什么，匈牙利是一个小国，但特朗普和万斯却对欧尔班着迷。匈牙利优先的外交政策？匈牙利人……我希望特朗普的背书是它应有的政治死亡之吻 - Adam Kinzinger (Slava Ukraini) 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: You're not going to let them toll the Strait, are you? U.S. President Donald Trump: "No, we're not going to allow that, it's international water. If they're doing that, we're not going to let that happen." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042729454439477447/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 记者：你不会让他们对海峡收费，对吧？美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“不，我们不会允许那样做，那是国际水域。如果他们那样做，我们不会让它发生。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042729454439477447/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor If Iran’s “military is gone,” the Strait wouldn’t still be under their control and missiles wouldn’t still be flying across the region. Q: What is your backup plan if there's no deal to open the Strait? Trump: “You don't need a backup plan. Their military is gone.” 🤡 🤡 🤡 https://x.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2042715991151391033/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 如果伊朗的“军队已经消失”，海峡就不会仍处于他们的控制之下，导弹也不会仍在该地区飞行。问：如果没有开放海峡的协议，你的备用计划是什么？特朗普：“你不需要备用计划。他们的军队已经消失了。” 🤡 🤡 🤡 https://x.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2042715991151391033/video/1 - 共和党人反对特朗普 推文

text: Shame shame Shame Curse you and curse your presidency and everyone who supports you Lebanon doesn't accept talks with Israel. You are a traitor and your presidency and Nawaf's will go in history as another traitorous one https://x.com/i/status/2042695162779103553
text_zh: 羞耻，羞耻，羞耻。诅咒你，诅咒你的总统任期，诅咒所有支持你的人。黎巴嫩不接受与以色列的会谈。你是一个叛徒，你和纳瓦夫的总统任期将作为另一个叛徒任期载入史册 https://x.com/i/status/2042695162779103553

text: Hezbullah continues to reap the results of its good heart by allying with bastards in Lebanon that stabbed it the moment they felt Hezbullah weak Not a single ally stayed with Hezbullah and everyone abandoned it. Only Marada leader (to an acceptable degree) and Amal stayed next to us. https://x.com/i/status/2042686822875304322
text_zh: 真主党继续因与黎巴嫩的混蛋结盟而自食其果，这些混蛋在感到真主党虚弱的那一刻就背刺了它。没有一个盟友留在真主党身边，所有人都抛弃了它。只有马拉达（Marada）领导人（在可接受的程度上）和阿迈勒（Amal）留在了我们身边。 https://x.com/i/status/2042686822875304322

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced at 01:40 on April 11 that they carried out a drone strike targeting Israeli forces inside a house in Chamaa, reporting direct hits. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党于4月11日01:40宣布，他们对沙马（Chamaa）一所房屋内的以色列军队进行了无人机袭击，并报告称直接命中目标。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Middle East Spectator — MES: — ❗️ 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 / 🇺🇸 NEW: Pakistan has released a list of names from the Iranian delegation It consists of 86 officials, experts, and media personnel. Some important names that are attending, which weren’t mentioned in media extensively, are Baqeri Kani, deputy of the SNSC, and Mohammad Nabavian, a notoriously conservative MP. Overall, this is a VERY heavy delegation which carries a lot of authority and expertise. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Middle East Spectator — MES：— ❗️ 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 / 🇺🇸 最新消息：巴基斯坦公布了伊朗代表团的名单，其中包括86名官员、专家和媒体人员。一些出席但未在媒体上广泛提及的重要人物包括最高国家安全委员会副秘书巴盖里·卡尼（Baqeri Kani）和臭名昭著的保守派议员穆罕默德·纳巴维安（Mohammad Nabavian）。总的来说，这是一个非常重量级的代表团，拥有很大的权力和专业知识。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 The New York Times: Iran has been unable to locate all of the mines it laid in the Strait of Hormuz, which has prevented the country from quickly complying with President Trump's demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway. Iranian negotiators and a US delegation led by Vice President JD Vance are set to meet in Pakistan for peace talks, which may be complicated by the issue of the mines in the strait. The Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps has issued warnings that ships could collide with sea mines, and has published charts showing safe routes, which are limited due to the haphazard mining of the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 《纽约时报》：伊朗一直无法定位其在霍尔木兹海峡布设的所有水雷，这阻碍了该国迅速遵守特朗普总统关于允许更多船只通过该水道的要求。伊朗谈判代表和由副总统JD·万斯率领的美国代表团定于在巴基斯坦举行和平会谈，海峡中的水雷问题可能会使会谈复杂化。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队已发出警告称船只可能会与水雷相撞，并发布了显示安全航线的图表，但由于海峡布雷混乱，这些航线非常有限。@wfwitness

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 NEW: Professor Mohammad Marandi, famous for his high-intensity interviews and debates with Western media outlets, seems to be part of the Iranian delegation in Islamabad Marandi previously served as an advisor to Iranian nuclear negotiators for the JCPOA. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 最新消息：以与西方媒体进行高强度采访和辩论而闻名的穆罕默德·马兰迪（Mohammad Marandi）教授似乎是伊斯兰堡伊朗代表团的一员。马兰迪此前曾担任伊朗核谈判代表的顾问，参与了伊核协议（JCPOA）的谈判。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : U.S. intelligence assessments indicate Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles and could retrieve launchers from underground storage areas, contradicting U.S. Defence Secretary Hegseth’s claim that Iran’s missile programme is “functionally destroyed”. While more than half of launchers have been destroyed or trapped, many can be repaired or dug out. Iran’s missile inventory has been roughly halved but still numbers in the thousands. Iran also retains a small inventory of cruise missiles. Some officials are concerned Tehran will use the ceasefire to reconstitute its arsenal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：美国情报评估显示，伊朗仍拥有数千枚弹道导弹，并可能从地下储存区取回发射装置，这与美国国防部长赫格塞斯（Hegseth）声称伊朗导弹计划“功能性被摧毁”的说法相矛盾。虽然超过一半的发射装置已被摧毁或被困，但许多装置可以修复或挖掘出来。伊朗的导弹库存大约减半，但仍有数千枚。伊朗还保留了少量巡航导弹。一些官员担心德黑兰会利用停火来重建其武库。@wfwitness

text: Muhoozi Kainerugaba, Uganda’s military chief: We are going to end ALL diplomatic relations with Türkiye in the next 30 days if they do not address our issues!
text_zh: 乌干达军事首长穆胡齐·凯内鲁加巴（Muhoozi Kainerugaba）：如果土耳其不解决我们的问题，我们将在未来30天内终止与土耳其的所有外交关系！

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a real agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian nation, they will see readiness for an agreement on our side as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive operation, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the capabilities of our nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗民族权利，他们也会看到我们达成协议的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为徒劳的表演或欺骗行动，我们准备通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的能力来捍卫我们的权利。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Unfortunately, our experience with negotiations with the Americans has always been accompanied by failure and breach of commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations-despite the goodwill of the Iranian side-they attacked us and committed numerous war crimes. We have goodwill, but we do not have trust.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：不幸的是，我们与美国谈判的经验总是伴随着失败和违背承诺。在不到一年的时间里，我们两次在谈判过程中——尽管伊朗方面表现出善意——遭到了他们的攻击并犯下了无数战争罪行。我们有善意，但我们没有信任。

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese and Israeli diplomats spoke by phone Friday and are planning to meet next week to discuss a ceasefire, the office of Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said in a social media post. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）的办公室在社交媒体上发帖称，黎巴嫩和以色列外交官周五进行了电话交谈，并计划下周会面讨论停火。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Ghalibaf at Islamabad Airport: Our experience negotiating with the United States has always been marked by failure and broken promises / We have goodwill, but no trust The Speaker of Parliament, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, upon arrival in Islamabad and in response to journalists’ questions about recent remarks by U.S. Vice President Vance, said: ➡️ Unfortunately, our experience in negotiations with the United States has consistently been one of failure and broken commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations—and despite Iran’s goodwill—we were attacked, and multiple war crimes were committed. ➡️ We have goodwill, but we do not have trust. ➡️ In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a genuine agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian people, they will see readiness from us as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive tactic, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the strength of our nation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 卡利巴夫在伊斯兰堡机场：我们与美国谈判的经验总是以失败和违背承诺为标志 / 我们有善意，但没有信任。议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫在抵达伊斯兰堡时，在回答记者关于美国副总统万斯最近言论的问题时说：➡️ 不幸的是，我们与美国谈判的经验一直伴随着失败和违背承诺。在不到一年的时间里，我们两次在谈判过程中——尽管伊朗表现出善意——遭到了攻击，并犯下了多起战争罪行。➡️ 我们有善意，但我们没有信任。➡️ 在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗人民权利，他们也会看到我们的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为徒劳的表演或欺骗策略，我们准备通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的力量来捍卫我们的权利。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: U.S. and Iran talks in Islamabad on Saturday are expected to start indirectly through mediators, then move to direct discussions later in the day. Source: CNN
text_zh: 预计周六在伊斯兰堡举行的美伊会谈将通过调解人进行间接开始，随后在当天晚些时候转为直接讨论。来源：CNN

text: Lebanon and the U.S. have asked Israel to pause its strikes ahead of planned talks next week. The U.S. supports the move, but Israel hasn’t agreed yet, with Netanyahu still reviewing it. Source: Axios
text_zh: 黎巴嫩和美国已要求以色列在下周计划的会谈前暂停袭击。美国支持这一举措，但以色列尚未同意，内塔尼亚胡仍在审查中。来源：Axios

text: 🇮🇷 Our dear friend, Professor Marandi, seems to be part of the negotiations team! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 我们亲爱的朋友马兰迪教授似乎是谈判小组的一员！🔴 @DDGeopolitics
